services.subtitle: From the first visit to handing over the keys, including long-term management and investor support — locals and diaspora.

band.quote: "Invest in Senegal, with a trusted local partner."
why.title: A method before a catalogue.
why.1.title: Systematic land-title check
why.1.desc: Each property goes through a land-title / lease / municipal-decision check before publication. No surprises at the notary.
why.2.title: Dedicated diaspora service
why.2.desc: Filmed visits, remote signatures, monthly construction updates via WhatsApp. Buy from Paris, New York or Milan — we handle on-site.
why.3.title: Transparent rental management
why.3.desc: Quarterly reporting, owner portal, photos of every maintenance intervention. Follow your property in real time.
why.4.title: Deep local network
why.4.desc: Notaries, surveyors, architects, partner banks: an ecosystem built over 14 years to smooth every step.
why.map.title: Our coverage area
process.title: From idea to keys in hand.
process.subtitle: Our four-step method to run a real estate project with no blind spots, whether you live here or abroad.
process.1.title: Scoping
process.1.desc: Spec sheet, budget, financing, timeline. We define the scope together before starting the search.
process.2.title: Selection
process.2.desc: Short-list of verified properties, physical or filmed visits, negotiation and formal offer.
process.3.title: Securing
process.3.desc: Partner notary, deed checks, follow-up on suspensive conditions through to signature.
process.4.title: Going live
process.4.desc: Renovation, furnishing, putting on the rental market or long-term management — your call, by your strategy.
testi.title: They trusted us.
testi.subtitle: Over 320 projects handled since 2018 — individuals, investors and diaspora clients.
testi.1.quote: Jamm Immobilier managed our villa purchase in Saly from Paris. Filmed visits, remote signature, near-daily progress updates. A real partner.
testi.1.name: A. Diop
testi.2.quote: Three tenants in two years for our Mermoz apartment, zero unpaid rent, and a clear report every quarter. We sleep easy.
testi.2.name: F. Sow
testi.3.quote: First purchase, lots of questions. The team took time to explain every document, the notary, the land title. Serious and patient.
testi.3.name: M. Ndiaye

owner.meta.title: Sell or let us manage your property
owner.meta.description: Owners, sellers and landlords: entrust your property to Jamm Immobilier. Free valuation, clear mandate, multichannel marketing with video reels, pre-qualified buyers and tenants, end-to-end support.
owner.title: Sell or rent your property with peace of mind.
owner.subtitle: Own an apartment, a villa, land or commercial premises in Dakar, Saly or elsewhere in Senegal? Entrust it to an agency that secures every step, showcases your property and only brings you buyers and tenants who are already qualified.
owner.benefits.title: Everything to showcase your property.
owner.benefits.subtitle: A transparent mandate, professional marketing and a single point of contact: you stay in control, we handle the operations.
owner.benefit.1.title: Free valuation & fair price
owner.benefit.1.desc: A reasoned valuation based on the real market in your neighbourhood — neither undervalued nor unsellable. You set the right price from day one.
owner.benefit.2.title: Clear, transparent mandate
owner.benefit.2.desc: Fees known upfront, conditions in writing, no hidden costs. You know exactly who does what, and when.
owner.benefit.3.title: Multichannel marketing & video reels
owner.benefit.3.desc: Polished photos and video reels filmed by the agency, distributed across our site, social channels and client database. Your property gets seen — and seen well.
owner.benefit.4.title: Qualified buyers & tenants
owner.benefit.4.desc: We screen and verify profiles before any visit: solvency, seriousness, file. You only meet genuinely interested candidates.
owner.benefit.5.title: Traceability & security
owner.benefit.5.desc: Supervised visits, documented follow-up, land-title checks. No more cold-calling or strangers at your door: everything goes through the agency.
owner.benefit.6.title: End-to-end support
owner.benefit.6.desc: From going to market to the notarial signature — or rental management afterwards — a single contact stays with you through to handover of the keys.
owner.steps.title: Entrust your property, made simple.
owner.steps.subtitle: Four clear, jargon-free steps to go from first contact to signature while keeping control.
owner.step.1.title: Get in touch
owner.step.1.desc: Tell us about your property and your goal — sale or rental. First conversation free and with no commitment, on-site or by video call.
owner.step.2.title: Valuation & mandate
owner.step.2.desc: Visit, reasoned valuation and a clear mandate proposal. You approve the price, the conditions and the marketing strategy.
owner.step.3.title: Showcasing & marketing
owner.step.3.desc: Photos, video reels and an optimised listing, distributed across all our channels. We organise and supervise every qualified visit.
owner.step.4.title: Negotiation & signature
owner.step.4.desc: We lead the negotiation, secure the deeds with our notary network and support you through to signature and handover of the keys.
owner.final.title: Start with a free estimate.
owner.final.lead: Tell us in a few words what you'd like to sell or put up for rent. We'll call you back within 24 business hours, no commitment.
partner.meta.title: Become a business-introducer partner
partner.meta.description: Agencies, brokers, partners and individuals: introduce a property or a client to Jamm Immobilier and get rewarded. Clear commission paid on closing, introduction protected against duplicates, transparent tracking of the deals you bring.
partner.title: Introduce a deal, get rewarded.
partner.subtitle: Know of a property to sell or let, or a buyer or tenant looking? Put it in the hands of an agency that protects your introduction, handles the deal seriously and pays you a clear commission on closing.
partner.benefits.title: Everything to value what you bring.
partner.benefits.subtitle: A commission agreed upfront, a protected introduction and transparent tracking: you entrust us with the deal, we handle the operations through to your payout.
partner.benefit.1.title: Clear, transparent commission
partner.benefit.1.desc: Commission agreed upfront, conditions in writing, paid when the deal closes. No vague percentages, no surprises: you know what you'll earn, and when.
partner.benefit.2.title: Protected introduction
partner.benefit.2.desc: Anti-duplicate, contact never short-circuited: your introduction is logged and tied to you from the first contact. Nobody goes over your head — consistent with our anti-cold-calling tightness.
partner.benefit.3.title: Transparent deal tracking
partner.benefit.3.desc: You always know where each introduced deal stands: pick-up, qualification, progress, outcome. A single point of contact keeps you informed at every step.
partner.benefit.4.title: Jamm's network & volume
partner.benefit.4.desc: Your introduction meets a database of already-qualified buyers and tenants and a steady deal flow. More outlets means more chances to close — and to get paid.
partner.benefit.5.title: Simplicity
partner.benefit.5.desc: One message is enough to submit a deal: describe the property or the client, we take it from there. No endless form, no paperwork upfront.
partner.benefit.6.title: Reliable, traceable payment
partner.benefit.6.desc: Commission paid in a traceable way once the deal closes, with a clear receipt. A serious, lasting partnership you can count on.
partner.steps.title: Introduce a deal, in four steps.
partner.steps.subtitle: Four clear, jargon-free steps to go from your introduction to your payout while keeping full visibility.
partner.step.1.title: You introduce
partner.step.1.desc: You flag a property to sell or let, or a buyer or tenant. A simple message is enough — your introduction is logged and tied to you.
partner.step.2.title: Jamm qualifies & handles
partner.step.2.desc: We verify and qualify the deal, then handle it with our method: showcasing, marketing, screened profiles, supervised visits.
partner.step.3.title: Transparent tracking
partner.step.3.desc: You follow the introduced deal at every step, with a single point of contact. No grey areas, no contact short-circuited.
partner.step.4.title: Reward on closing
partner.step.4.desc: Once the deal closes, we pay you the agreed commission, reliably and traceably, with a clear receipt.
partner.final.title: Got a deal in mind? One message is enough.
partner.final.lead: Tell us in a few words the property or client you'd like to introduce. We'll get back to you within 24 business hours, with clear terms.

geo.quartier.empty.title: No listings online in {name} right now

geo.faq.generic.a: Yes. Every property is checked by our team before publication: title, availability, price and features. You deal with an agency, not an unfiltered listings directory.
faq.title: Everything to know before getting in touch
faq.q1: What services does Jamm Immobilier offer?
faq.a1: We handle sales, rentals, property management and real-estate advisory in Senegal. Whether you're an owner, buyer, tenant or investor, we manage your project end to end: valuation, staging, viewings, negotiation and administrative follow-up.
faq.q2: Which cities and neighbourhoods do you cover?
faq.a2: Our core area is Dakar — Almadies, Ngor, Ouakam, Mermoz, Point E, Fann, Plateau, Sacré-Cœur, Yoff, Grand Yoff, Liberté, Parcelles Assainies — and we also operate on the Petite-Côte (Saly, Mbour), in Thiès and Saint-Louis.
faq.a3: Yes. Every property is verified by our team before publication: existence, real availability, price and features. You avoid the ghost listings and duplicates common on open platforms.
faq.q4: Do you support the diaspora and remote purchases?
faq.a4: Absolutely. We provide filmed viewings, detailed reports and remote follow-up for diaspora clients, all the way to signing and, if needed, rental management once the property is acquired.
faq.q5: How does a rental or sale process work?
faq.a5: A free first conversation to scope your need, then valuation and staging, targeted marketing, organised viewings, negotiation, and support through to signing and handover of the keys.
faq.a6: Our fees follow standard Senegalese market practice and are disclosed transparently before any commitment, with no hidden costs. Contact us for an estimate tailored to your project.
estimate.meta.title: Quick estimate — value your property in 1 minute
estimate.meta.description: Describe your property in 1 minute and get a free, expert-prepared valuation from Jamm Immobilier within 24h. No commitment.
estimate.page.title: Value your property in 1 minute
estimate.page.subtitle: Build your property step by step, free and without signing up. At the end, a Jamm expert sends you a priced valuation within 24h.
estimate.title: Your property, in a few clicks
estimate.subtitle: Free, no commitment. No contact details required before you see the result.
estimate.q.transaction: Do you want to sell or let?
estimate.q.surface.terrain: What is the plot area, in m²?
estimate.hint.quartier: Type at least 3 letters: communes and neighbourhoods across all of Senegal are suggested. You can also type freely.
estimate.result.factorsTitle: 3 factors that add value to your property
estimate.result.factor.1: Location and the neighbourhood's rental demand — a sought-after area pulls value up.
estimate.result.factor.2: Surface area and layout — an optimised floor plan and clear volumes appeal to buyers and tenants.
estimate.result.factor.3: Condition and standing — a move-in-ready or tastefully renovated property is worth more and sells faster.
estimate.result.offerBody: No rough automatic number: a Jamm Immobilier expert reviews your property and sends you a precise, personalised valuation within 24h. It's free and with no commitment.
estimate.capture.title: Just one more step
estimate.capture.body: Leave your WhatsApp number: an expert sends you your priced valuation within 24h. Nothing else will be asked.
estimate.done.title: Got it, thank you!
estimate.done.body: A Jamm Immobilier expert is preparing your priced valuation and will contact you on WhatsApp within 24h.
estimate.wa.intro: Hello Jamm Immobilier, I'd like an estimate for my property.
budget.meta.title: My budget — find what you can aim for
budget.meta.description: Tell us your budget and area: we show you the real listings that fit, and a Jamm advisor prepares a personalised shortlist with alerts on WhatsApp. Free, no commitment.
budget.page.title: What can my budget get me?
budget.page.subtitle: Tell us your budget and your area, free and without signing up. We show you the real listings that fit, then an advisor prepares a tailored shortlist for you.
budget.title: Your project, in a few clicks
budget.subtitle: Free, no commitment. No contact details required before you see the result.
budget.q.transaction: Do you want to buy or rent?
budget.hint.budget.acheter: The overall budget you can put towards a purchase. We make no loan calculation: we start from what you tell us.
budget.hint.budget.louer: The maximum rent you can pay each month.
budget.hint.zone: Type at least 3 letters: communes and neighbourhoods across all of Senegal are suggested. You can also type freely.
budget.hint.type: Optional. Leave on “Any type” to see every kind of property.
budget.result.recapSuffix: , here's what you can aim for.
budget.result.point.1: Your budget is a working range: depending on the neighbourhood and the property's condition, we adjust up or down to stay realistic.
budget.result.point.2: Properties that sell fast aren't always online: an advisor flags opportunities to you as soon as they come up, before they're gone.
budget.result.point.3: No automatic loan calculation: in Senegal financing is discussed case by case. We honestly point you to what's within your reach.
budget.result.offerTitle: A personalised shortlist + alerts on WhatsApp
budget.result.offerBody: Leave your WhatsApp number: a Jamm advisor prepares a tailored shortlist within your budget and tells you first whenever a property matches. Free and with no commitment.
budget.capture.title: Just one more step
budget.capture.body: Leave your WhatsApp number: an advisor sends you a personalised shortlist within your budget plus alerts whenever a property matches. Nothing else will be asked.
budget.done.title: Got it, thank you!
budget.done.body: A Jamm Immobilier advisor is preparing your personalised shortlist and will contact you on WhatsApp. You'll be told first whenever a property matches your budget.
budget.wa.intro: Hello Jamm Immobilier, here is my budget and my search.

safety.meta.title: Land safety — check a property before you buy
safety.meta.description: Free anti-scam self-check: answer 6 questions about the title, the seller and the price. We flag the warning signs, then a Jamm expert verifies the authenticity of the documents free of charge. No sign-up.
safety.page.title: Is this property safe to buy?
safety.page.subtitle: In Senegal, land scams (fake titles, multiple sales, unlicensed brokers) are common. Answer 6 questions, free and without signing up: we flag the warning signs, then a Jamm expert checks the documents for you.
safety.title: A 6-question check
safety.subtitle: Free, no commitment. No contact details required before you see the result.
safety.q.doc: Which ownership document does the seller present?
safety.q.original: Have you seen the original document (not just a photo)?
safety.q.vendeur: Does the name on the document match the seller's ID?
safety.q.prix: How does the asking price compare with the local market?
safety.q.visite: Have you visited the land and checked its boundaries?
safety.opt.original.copie: Only a copy or a photo
safety.opt.vendeur.different: No, the name is different or unclear
safety.opt.interlocuteur.proprio: The owner directly, or a notary
safety.opt.interlocuteur.mandataire: An agent with a written power of attorney
safety.opt.interlocuteur.coxeur: A middleman (coxeur) with no written mandate
safety.opt.prix.tropbas: Abnormally low (“too good to be true”)
safety.flag.doc.bail: A lease is not full ownership: check its duration, its origin and that it hasn't expired or already been transferred.
safety.flag.doc.delib: A municipal allocation alone is fragile: it must be confirmed and ideally turned into a lease or title. Many disputes start here.
safety.flag.doc.papier: A plain private deed does not prove ownership and isn't legally enforceable: require a title, a lease or a verifiable allocation.
safety.flag.doc.aucun: Without a verifiable ownership document, don't pay anything: this is the most common scam scenario.
safety.flag.original.copie: A photo or photocopy is easy to forge: insist on seeing the original and have it checked at the land registry.
safety.flag.original.non: You haven't seen the ownership document: don't pay any deposit until it's shown and verified.
safety.flag.vendeur.pas: Identity not verified: make sure the seller is the person named on the title (risk of impersonation).
safety.flag.vendeur.different: The seller's name doesn't match the document: major danger (sale by someone who isn't the owner). Don't proceed without verification.
safety.flag.interlocuteur.mandataire: Agent: ask for the written power of attorney and, if possible, speak to the owner directly.
safety.flag.interlocuteur.coxeur: A middleman with no mandate is a strong warning sign: risk of multiple sales or of a commission on a property he doesn't represent.
safety.flag.prix.bas: A below-market price can be normal — or hide a problem (dispute, dubious document). Worth digging into.
safety.flag.prix.tropbas: An abnormally low price is the classic trap to rush you into paying: take the time to verify everything.
safety.flag.visite.visite: Boundaries not checked: have the land surveyed to avoid encroachments and neighbour disputes.
safety.flag.visite.non: Property never visited: don't commit based on photos. A visit reveals the real occupancy and the boundaries.
safety.result.vert.title: Good instinct: few warning signs.
safety.result.vert.body: Your answers don't reveal any major red flag. Stay careful until signing: only an official check of the documents removes all doubt.
safety.result.orange.title: A few points are worth checking before going further.
safety.result.orange.body: Nothing blocking at first sight, but some elements must be confirmed before any payment. Don't pay a deposit until these points are cleared up.
safety.result.rouge.title: Warning: several scam signals are present.
safety.result.rouge.body: Your answers add up to red flags common in land scams. Don't pay ANY money and have the file checked before any decision.
safety.result.noFlags: No major warning sign in your answers. That's a good sign — but an official check of the documents remains the only guarantee.
safety.result.disclaimer: This self-check is indicative: it does not replace a legal verification. Only a check at the land registry confirms the authenticity of a title and the identity of the real owner.
safety.result.offerTitle: Free verification by a Jamm expert
safety.result.offerBody: Leave your WhatsApp number: a Jamm expert checks the authenticity of the documents, the seller's identity and the property's history free of charge, and warns you of the traps. No commitment.
safety.result.cta: Have this property checked for free
safety.capture.title: Just one more step
safety.capture.body: Leave your WhatsApp number: a Jamm expert takes over your check and verifies the file with you. Nothing else will be asked.
safety.done.title: Got it, thank you!
safety.done.body: A Jamm Immobilier expert takes over your check and will contact you on WhatsApp to verify the file with you, free of charge.
safety.wa.intro: Hello Jamm Immobilier, I'd like to have a property checked before buying.
safety.detail.cta: Buying safely? Take the free anti-scam check
